description: AI creates personalized learning paths from saved content

data.label: Fetch Article Content
data.description: Make HTTP API requests with advanced options

url.label: URL
url.description: The URL to make the request to

timeout.label: Timeout
timeout.description: Time in milliseconds to wait for response

maxRedirects.label: Max Redirects
maxRedirects.description: Maximum number of redirects to follow

allowUnauthorizedCerts.label: Ignore SSL Issues
allowUnauthorizedCerts.description: Allow requests with invalid SSL certificates

sendBody.label: Body
sendBody.description: Add a body to the request

sendQuery.label: Query Parameters
sendQuery.description: Add query parameters to the request

neverError.label: Never Error
neverError.description: HTTP errors will not cause the node to fail

sendHeaders.label: Headers
sendHeaders.description: Add custom headers to the request

fullResponse.label: Include Response Headers and Status
fullResponse.description: Return full response including headers and status code

data.label: Message a Model
data.description: Create a chat completion with Google Gemini model

model.label: Model
model.description: The Gemini model to use for generation. Available models are fetched from your credential.

messages.label: Messages

role.label: Role
role.description: The role of the message sender

content.label: Prompt
content.placeholder: e.g. Hello, how can you help me?

messages.description: Array of message objects for the conversation

simplify.label: Simplify Output
simplify.description: Return simplified response instead of raw data

jsonOutput.label: Output Content as JSON
jsonOutput.description: Attempt to return the response in JSON format

temperature.label: Temperature
temperature.description: Controls randomness (0-2). Lower is more deterministic

systemMessage.label: System Message
systemMessage.description: Optional system instruction for the model
systemMessage.placeholder: e.g. You are a helpful assistant

maxOutputTokens.label: Maximum Output Tokens
maxOutputTokens.description: Maximum number of tokens to generate

data.label: Append Text
data.description: Append text to the end of a document

text.label: Text
text.description: Content to add at the end of the document
text.placeholder: Text to append to the document

data.label: Send Message

text.description: Text of the message to be sent (1-4096 characters)

parseMode.label: Parse Mode
parseMode.description: How to parse entities in the message
